caption: A video conference call featuring a grid of several participants is shown. The participants are predominantly men of various ages, most wearing casual attire like t-shirts and sweaters; one man wears a blue baseball cap, and another wears glasses. Some participants are speaking or gesturing, while others listen attentively. The backgrounds vary from home offices and living rooms to plain walls. Some frames include a light blue circular logo with white text that says "Join the conversation." Small text labels appear beneath some participants, such as "Jerry Mihalka," "Howard Silverman," "Gary Billington," "Susan Stewart," "Jim Bartko," "Patrick Naylor," and "Ezra_collaborator." The layout of the participants remains consistent, but their expressions and positions shift slightly as they interact during the meeting. The overall scene depicts a professional yet casual remote collaborative session.
